name: saeed
description: SAEED (سعيد) — Self-Advancing Elite Engineering Directorate. A self-improving team of 53 specialist Claude Code subagents spanning architecture, web + native iOS/Android, backend, databases, AI/RAG, GPU/AI-systems, networking, security, DevOps, design, QA, and bilingual (Arabic/English) delivery — with a micro-managing boss, an HR lead that staffs the team, a prompt engineer, a continuous-improvement loop, two absorbed skill-sets (an elite Design Excellence canon with its own design-review gate, and a parallel-orchestration/delivery protocol), and the ability to upgrade its own models and roster.
